Prompt: Build the AXION Controller Web App

You are building a production-ready web application called Axion Assembler. This web app is the controller for the AXION system. AXION already exists as a repo with scripts, templates, registries, module dependencies, presets, governance checks, hashing drift detection, repair outputs, and tests. The web app must expose and orchestrate all AXION features through a clean UI + backend API, and it must do so by executin...
